title: Core Workflow Definition
description: Defines a multi-step agent workflow with dependencies, conditional logic, and error recovery.

version.description: Semantic version of this workflow definition.

description.description: What this workflow does and when to use it.

tags.description: Tags for discovery and skill matching.

inputs.description: Workflow-level input parameters. Keys are parameter names.

outputs.description: Workflow-level outputs mapped from step results.

fromStep.description: Step key to source the value from.

mode.description: Default execution mode. 'dependency' respects dependsOn edges; 'sequential' runs steps in definition order; 'parallel' runs all at once.

maxConcurrent.description: Max concurrent agents when mode is 'parallel' or 'dependency'.

timeoutMs.description: Wall-clock timeout for the entire workflow.

onFailure.description: Default failure policy applied to steps that don't define their own.

default.description: Default value if not provided at runtime.

key.description: Unique identifier within the workflow. Lowercase, alphanumeric with hyphens/underscores.

prompt.description: Agent prompt. Supports {{input.paramName}} and {{steps.prevKey.output}} template interpolation.

dependsOn.description: Step keys that must complete before this step runs.

condition.description: Conditional gate — step only runs if this evaluates to true.

inputs.description: Input mappings from workflow inputs or prior step outputs.

priority.description: Priority (0 = highest). Used for scheduling order.

retries.description: Number of retry attempts on failure.

onFailure.description: Step-level failure policy, overrides workflow default.

cwd.description: Working directory override for this step's agent.

condition.description: Conditional expression. Exactly one of the operator fields must be set.

stepStatus.description: True if the referenced step finished with the given status.

inputEquals.description: True if a workflow input matches the given value.

allOf.description: All sub-conditions must be true (logical AND).

anyOf.description: At least one sub-condition must be true (logical OR).

action.description: 'stop' aborts the workflow. 'continue' skips the failed step and proceeds. 'fallback' runs the fallbackStep.

fallbackStep.description: Step key to run as a fallback (required when action is 'fallback').
